ucs.title: [LLM] Midnight Blizzard (APT29) service-principal credential addition followed by Exchange Online / Graph access
ucs.description: Hunts the exact Midnight Blizzard tradecraft used in the January 2024 Microsoft corporate compromise: after compromising an identity (often via password spray against a legacy tenant), the actor adds a new secret/certificate to an existing OAuth application or service principal, then uses that SP non-interactively against Office 365 Exchange Online or Microsoft Graph to read corporate mailboxes (T1098.001/.005 → T1114.002). High-fidelity because legitimate SP credential rotations rarely sign in to Exchange Online within hours of the change from the same actor.
ucs.splunk: | tstats `summariesonly` count min(_time) as cred_add_time max(_time) as last_add from datamodel=Change.All_Changes where All_Changes.action=modified All_Changes.object_category="service_principal" (All_Changes.command IN ("Add service principal credentials","Update application Certificates and secrets management","Add a key to service principal","Update application Certificates and secrets management.")) by All_Changes.object_id All_Changes.user All_Changes.src All_Changes.command | rename All_Changes.* as * | rename object_id as app_id | join type=inner app_id [ | tstats `summariesonly` count values(Authentication.dest) as resources values(Authentication.src) as sp_signin_src min(_time) as first_sp_signin from datamodel=Authentication.Authentication where Authentication.action=success Authentication.user_type="ServicePrincipal" (Authentication.dest IN ("Office 365 Exchange Online","Microsoft Graph","Outlook.Office365.com")) by Authentication.app Authentication.user | rename Authentication.* as * | rename user as app_id ] | where first_sp_signin >= cred_add_time AND first_sp_signin <= cred_add_time + 172800 | eval delta_hours = round((first_sp_signin - cred_add_time)/3600,2) | table cred_add_time first_sp_signin delta_hours app_id app user src sp_signin_src resources command | sort 0 cred_add_time
ucs.kql:
// APT29 / Midnight Blizzard — credential added to an OAuth app/SP that then signs in to Exchange Online or Graph
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let CorrelationWindow = 48h;
let _suspect_ops = dynamic([
    "Add service principal credentials.",
    "Update application \u2013 Certificates and secrets management.",
    "Update application \u2013 Certificates and secrets management ",
    "Add a key to service principal",
    "Add owner to service principal.",
    "Consent to application.",
    "Add delegated permission grant.",
    "Add app role assignment to service principal."
]);
let CredAdds =
    CloudAppEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where Application in ("Office 365","Microsoft 365 admin center","Microsoft Entra")
    | where ActionType in (_suspect_ops)
    | extend TargetAppName = tostring(ActivityObjects[0].Name),
             TargetAppId   = tostring(ActivityObjects[0].Id)
    | project CredAddTime = Timestamp, ActionType, AccountObjectId, AccountDisplayName,
              IPAddress, CountryCode, ISP, UserAgent, TargetAppName, TargetAppId;
let GraphResourceIds = dynamic([
    "00000003-0000-0000-c000-000000000000",   // Microsoft Graph
    "00000002-0000-0ff1-ce00-000000000000"    // Office 365 Exchange Online
]);
CloudAppEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where AccountType =~ "Application" or ActionType in~ ("MailItemsAccessed","Send","Update","SearchQueryInitiatedExchange")
| where Application in ("Office 365 Exchange Online","Microsoft Graph","Microsoft Exchange Online")
| extend AppActor = tostring(AccountDisplayName)
| join kind=inner CredAdds on $left.AppActor == $right.TargetAppName
| where Timestamp between (CredAddTime .. CredAddTime + CorrelationWindow)
| project CredAddTime, AppUseTime = Timestamp,
          DelayHrs = datetime_diff('hour', Timestamp, CredAddTime),
          AddedBy = AccountDisplayName1, AddedFromIP = IPAddress1, AddCountry = CountryCode1, AddOp = ActionType1,
          TargetAppName, TargetAppId,
          MailboxAccessAction = ActionType, AccessedFromIP = IPAddress, AccessedFromCountry = CountryCode,
          UserAgent, AdditionalFields
| order by CredAddTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// APT29 / Midnight Blizzard — SP credential added then used against Exchange Online / Graph
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let CorrelationWindow = 48h;
let _suspect_ops = dynamic([
    "Add service principal credentials",
    "Update application \u2013 Certificates and secrets management",
    "Update application Certificates and secrets management",
    "Add a key to service principal",
    "Add owner to service principal",
    "Consent to application",
    "Add delegated permission grant",
    "Add app role assignment to service principal"
]);
let CredAdds =
    AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where Result =~ "success"
    | where OperationName in (_suspect_ops)
    | extend AppId   = tostring(TargetResources[0].id),
             AppName = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName),
             InitiatorUpn = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName),
             InitiatorIp  = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.ipAddress),
             InitiatorAppId = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).app.appId)
    | project CredAddTime = TimeGenerated, OperationName, AppId, AppName,
              InitiatorUpn, InitiatorIp, InitiatorAppId;
let GraphResources = dynamic([
    "00000003-0000-0000-c000-000000000000",   // Microsoft Graph
    "00000002-0000-0ff1-ce00-000000000000"    // Office 365 Exchange Online
]);
AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where ResultType == 0
| where ResourceId in (GraphResources) or ResourceDisplayName in~ ("Office 365 Exchange Online","Microsoft Graph")
| project SpSignInTime = TimeGenerated, AppId, ServicePrincipalName,
          ResourceDisplayName, ResourceId, IPAddress, Location,
          ServicePrincipalCredentialKeyId, ServicePrincipalCredentialThumbprint
| join kind=inner CredAdds on AppId
| where SpSignInTime between (CredAddTime .. CredAddTime + CorrelationWindow)
| extend DelayHrs = datetime_diff('hour', SpSignInTime, CredAddTime),
         CountryAtSignIn = tostring(parse_json(tostring(Location)))
| project CredAddTime, SpSignInTime, DelayHrs, OperationName,
          AppName, AppId, InitiatorUpn, InitiatorIp,
          ServicePrincipalName, ResourceDisplayName, IPAddress,
          CountryAtSignIn, ServicePrincipalCredentialKeyId
| order by CredAddTime desc
ucs.rationale: This chain — add SP credential → SP signs in to Exchange Online / Graph within hours from a different IP than the cred-add operator — IS the Midnight Blizzard 2024 playbook (MSRC, Mandiant M-Trends 2024, CISA AA24-057A). Generic OAuth-abuse rules just look at consent grants; this looks at the post-consent credential-rotation pivot which is far less noisy and is uniquely characteristic of NOBELIUM/

ucs.title: [LLM] APT29 / Midnight Blizzard residential-proxy password spray against legacy auth + downstream OAuth consent
ucs.description: Hunts the SVR's pre-cursor to the Microsoft, HPE and TeamViewer 2023-24 incidents: low-and-slow password spraying using a residential-proxy / TOR fan-out against accounts that still permit legacy / non-interactive auth (SMTP, IMAP, EAS, ROPC), followed by an OAuth application consent or token request from the newly-compromised principal. Cluster names: Midnight Blizzard / NOBELIUM / Cozy Bear / IRON RITUAL / SVR.
ucs.splunk: | tstats `summariesonly` count as fail_count dc(Authentication.user) as users_attempted dc(Authentication.src) as src_ips values(Authentication.src_country) as countries values(Authentication.app) as apps min(_time) as first_attempt max(_time) as last_attempt from datamodel=Authentication.Authentication where Authentication.action=failure Authentication.signature_id IN (50126,50053,50055,50056,50064,50034,50059) (Authentication.authentication_method IN ("Other clients","Authenticated SMTP","IMAP4","POP3","Exchange ActiveSync","ROPC") OR Authentication.is_interactive=false) by _time span=1h Authentication.tenant_id | rename Authentication.* as * | where users_attempted >= 25 AND src_ips >= 15 | eval spray_ratio = round(src_ips/users_attempted,2), per_ip_avg = round(fail_count/src_ips,2) | where spray_ratio > 0.4 AND per_ip_avg < 8 | join type=left tenant_id [ | tstats `summariesonly` count as success_count values(Authentication.user) as compromised_users values(Authentication.src) as success_src from datamodel=Authentication.Authentication where Authentication.action=success (Authentication.authentication_method IN ("Other clients","Authenticated SMTP","IMAP4","POP3","Exchange ActiveSync","ROPC")) by _time span=1h Authentication.tenant_id | rename Authentication.* as * ] | where isnotnull(success_count) | table _time first_attempt last_attempt fail_count users_attempted src_ips spray_ratio per_ip_avg countries apps success_count compromised_users success_src | sort 0 -fail_count
ucs.kql:
// APT29 / Midnight Blizzard — residential-proxy password spray vs legacy auth + a successful follow-on
let SprayWindow = 1h;
let Lookback = 24h;
let LegacyApps = dynamic(["Other clients","Authenticated SMTP","IMAP4","POP3","Exchange ActiveSync"]);
let SprayErrors = dynamic([50126, 50053, 50055, 50056, 50064, 50034, 50059]);
let Sprays =
    AADSignInEventsBeta
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where ClientAppUsed in (LegacyApps) or IsInteractive == false
    | where ErrorCode in (SprayErrors)
    | summarize FailCount = count(),
                UsersAttempted = dcount(AccountUpn),
                SourceIPs      = dcount(IPAddress),
                IPSample       = make_set(IPAddress, 25),
                Countries      = make_set(Country, 15),
                Apps           = make_set(ClientAppUsed, 10),
                FirstAttempt   = min(Timestamp),
                LastAttempt    = max(Timestamp),
                AnonProxyHits  = countif(IsAnonymousProxy == true)
                by bin(Timestamp, SprayWindow)
    | extend SprayRatio = todouble(SourceIPs) / todouble(UsersAttempted),
             PerIpAvg   = todouble(FailCount) / todouble(SourceIPs)
    | where UsersAttempted >= 25 and SourceIPs >= 15
    | where SprayRatio > 0.4 and PerIpAvg < 8;     // many IPs each touching very few users = residential-proxy fan-out
let Successes =
    AADSignInEventsBeta
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where ErrorCode == 0
    | where ClientAppUsed in (LegacyApps) or IsInteractive == false
    | project SuccessTime = Timestamp, AccountUpn, SuccessIp = IPAddress,
              SuccessCountry = Country, SuccessApp = ClientAppUsed, AppDisplayName, IsAnonymousProxy;
Sprays
| join kind=inner Successes on $left.Timestamp == $right.SuccessTime  // dummy to keep cross product, then filter
| where SuccessTime between (FirstAttempt .. LastAttempt + 4h)
| project SprayBin = Timestamp, FirstAttempt, LastAttempt,
          FailCount, UsersAttempted, SourceIPs, SprayRatio, PerIpAvg,
          Countries, AnonProxyHits,
          CompromisedUpn = AccountUpn, SuccessTime, SuccessIp, SuccessCountry,
          SuccessApp, AppDisplayName, SuccessFromAnonProxy = IsAnonymousProxy
| order by SprayBin desc, SuccessTime asc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// APT29 / Midnight Blizzard — residential-proxy spray vs legacy auth + a follow-on success
let SprayWindow = 1h;
let Lookback = 24h;
let LegacyApps = dynamic(["Other clients","Authenticated SMTP","IMAP4","POP3","Exchange ActiveSync"]);
let SprayErrors = dynamic([50126, 50053, 50055, 50056, 50064, 50034, 50059]);
let AllAuth =
    union isfuzzy=true
        ( SigninLogs                       | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback) ),
        ( AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs  | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback) )
    | extend Country = tostring(parse_json(tostring(LocationDetails)).countryOrRegion);
let Sprays =
    AllAuth
    | where ResultType in (SprayErrors)
    | where ClientAppUsed in (LegacyApps) or IsInteractive == false
    | summarize FailCount = count(),
                UsersAttempted = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
                SourceIPs      = dcount(IPAddress),
                IPSample       = make_set(IPAddress, 25),
                Countries      = make_set(Country, 15),
                Apps           = make_set(ClientAppUsed, 10),
                ASNs           = make_set(AutonomousSystemNumber, 25),
                FirstAttempt   = min(TimeGenerated),
                LastAttempt    = max(TimeGenerated)
                by bin(TimeGenerated, SprayWindow)
    | extend SprayRatio = todouble(SourceIPs) / todouble(UsersAttempted),
             PerIpAvg   = todouble(FailCount) / todouble(SourceIPs)
    | where UsersAttempted >= 25 and SourceIPs >= 15
    | where SprayRatio > 0.4 and PerIpAvg < 8;
let Successes =
    AllAuth
    | where ResultType == 0
    | where ClientAppUsed in (LegacyApps) or IsInteractive == false
    | project SuccessTime = TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, SuccessIp = IPAddress,
              SuccessCountry = Country, SuccessApp = ClientAppUsed, AppDisplayName,
              RiskLevelDuringSignIn, RiskEventTypes_V2;
Sprays
| extend SprayWindowStart = FirstAttempt, SprayWindowEnd = LastAttempt + 4h
| join kind=inner Successes on $left.SprayWindowStart == $right.SuccessTime
| where SuccessTime between (SprayWindowStart .. SprayWindowEnd)
| project SprayBinStart = TimeGenerated, FirstAttempt, LastAttempt,
          FailCount, UsersAttempted, SourceIPs, SprayRatio, PerIpAvg,
          Countries, ASNs, IPSample,
          CompromisedUpn = UserPrincipalName, SuccessTime, SuccessIp,
          SuccessCountry, SuccessApp, AppDisplayName,
          RiskLevelDuringSignIn, RiskEventTypes_V2
| order by SprayBinStart desc, SuccessTime asc
ucs.rationale: Generic password-spray rules count failures from one IP. Midnight Blizzard's signature is the *opposite* shape: many residential-proxy IPs each touching only 1-3 users, against the legacy / non-interactive auth surface (Exchange ActiveSync / SMTP AUTH / IMAP / ROPC) that bypasses Conditional Access MFA. Combining the IP-fan-out shape (SprayRatio > 0.4) with the legacy-auth predicate AND a successf
